improvement_roadmap.recommendation: Standardize discharge/billing communication; train front-desk workflow; implement escalation path.
Optimize appointment scheduling + triage; add live queue visibility; enforce on-time SLA.
Run service training; implement complaint-resolution SLA and coaching loop.
Facility checklist + ticketing; weekly audits on cleanliness and amenities.
Document what drives 5-star visits and scale those service patterns.
Protect top-performing workflows; replicate best practices across shifts/units.
Launch staff recognition program; use mentions as coaching and reward signals.
